en: A small lizard crawled on the office wall, catching a fly with its lightning-fast tongue.

en: Axmed's transition from a student to a business leader is truly inspiring.

en: Axmed expanded his business into real estate and began developing sustainable housing projects.
so: Axmed wuxuu ganacsigiisa ku ballaariyey hantida maguurtada ah, wuxuuna bilaabay horumarinta mashaariicda guryaha ee waara.

en: He used a 3D printer to create miniature models of the apartment complexes he planned to build.
so: Wuxuu isticmaalay mashiinka daabacaadda tirii diiga si uu u abuuro moodallo yaryar oo ah dhismooyinka dabaqyada ee uu qorsheeyey dhisidooda.

en: To measure the land accurately, his team used a total station and a long measuring tape.
so: Si dhulka si sax ah loogu cabbiro, kooxdiisu waxay isticmaaleen aaladda total station iyo cajalad cabbir oo dheer.

en: In the construction site, he saw a beaver building a dam in the nearby stream, showing nature's engineering.
so: Goobta dhismaha, wuxuu ku arkay af-mishaar (beaver) ka dhisaya biyo-xireen durdurka dhow, taasoo muujinaysa injineernimada dabeecadda.

en: Axmed's breakfast now included papaya slices, almonds, and a glass of fresh camel milk.
so: Quraacda Axmed hadda waxaa ku jiray googo' babbay ah, almonds, iyo koob caano geel oo cusub.

en: He installed solar panels on the roofs of his buildings to provide clean and renewable energy.
so: Wuxuu muraayadaha cadceedda (solar panels) ku rakibay saqafyada dhismooyinkiisa si uu u bixiyo tamar nadiif ah oo dib loo cusboonaysiin karo.

en: Axmed used a heavy-duty electric drill to secure the frames of the solar panels.
so: Axmed wuxuu isticmaalay mashiinka daloolinta (drill) ee xooggan si uu u adkeeyo qaab-dhismeedka muraayadaha cadceedda.

en: He noticed the bricks were high quality, so he used a spirit level to check their alignment.
so: Wuxuu arkay in lebenku ahaa mid tayo leh, markaasuu isticmaalay miisaanka biyaha (spirit level) si uu u hubiyo sinnaantooda.

en: For a snack at the site, he shared some dates and roasted peanuts with the construction workers.
so: Fududayn ahaan goobta dhismaha, wuxuu shaqaalaha dhismaha la wadaagay timir iyo loos duban.

en: A crane flapped its long wings and flew over the scaffolding of the new skyscraper.
so: Karaan (crane) ayaa lulay baalasheeda dhaadheer, wuxuuna ka dul duulay tiirarka dhismaha (scaffolding) ee dabaqa cusub.

en: Axmed's vision for modern Somali cities includes green spaces and eco-friendly materials.
so: Aragtida Axmed ee magaalooyinka casriga ah ee Soomaaliya waxaa ku jira goobo cagaaran iyo qalab deegaanka u saaxiib ah.

en: A 3D printer allows architects to visualize their designs in three dimensions quickly.
so: Mashiinka daabacaadda 3D wuxuu u oggolaanayaa naqshadeeyayaasha inay si degdeg ah u arkaan nashqadahooda saddex dhinac ah.

en: The beaver is known as nature's architect because it modifies its environment significantly.
so: Af-mishaarka waxaa loo yaqaannaa naqshadeeyaha dabeecadda sababtoo ah wuxuu si weyn u beddelaa deegaankiisa.

en: I can help you translate complex engineering and construction terms into Somali.
so: Waxaan kugu caawin karaa inaad ereyo adag oo injineernimo iyo dhismo ah u turjunto af Soomaali.

en: List the tools Axmed's team used for land measurement and solar panel installation.
so: Iii qor qalabka ay kooxda Axmed u isticmaaleen cabbirka dhulka iyo rakibidda muraayadaha cadceedda.

en: What fruit and milk did Axmed have for his energetic breakfast today?
so: Miro noocee ah iyo caano noocee ah ayuu Axmed u quraacday maanta si uu tamar u helo?

en: Identify the two birds or animals that Axmed saw near the construction site.
so: Sheeg labada shimbirood ama xayawaan ee uu Axmed ku arkay agagaarka goobta dhismaha.

en: Describe the benefits of using solar panels in a large housing complex.
so: Sifeey faa'iidooyinka ay leedahay in muraayadaha cadceedda laga isticmaalo dhismooyinka guryaha ee waaweyn.

en: Write a short paragraph about the role of a 3D printer in modern real estate.
so: Qor baaraagraf gaaban oo ku saabsan doorka mashiinka 3D printer-ka ee hantida maguurtada ah ee casriga ah.

en: Explain how a spirit level ensures that a wall is built perfectly straight.
so: Sharax sida miisaanka biyaha (spirit level) u hubiyo in gidaarku u dhisman yahay si qumman.

en: Compare the engineering skills of a beaver to the human engineers on Axmed's team.
so: Isbarbardhig xirfadaha injineernimo ee af-mishaarka iyo injineerada bini'aadanka ah ee kooxda Axmed.

en: What is the Somali word for 'real estate' and 'sustainable' in this context?
so: Waa maxay ereyga Soomaaliga ah ee 'hantida maguurtada ah' iyo 'waara' ee nuxurkan dhexdiisa?

en: Provide a list of safety gear needed on a construction site.
so: Iii sii liiska agabka badbaadada ee looga baahan yahay goobta dhismaha.

en: Check the spelling of 'scaffolding' and 'excavator' in the Somali translation.
so: Hubi higgaadda 'tiirarka dhismaha' iyo 'mashiinka qodista' ee turjumaadda Soomaaliga.

en: How does renewable energy reduce the operational costs of a modern building?
so: Sidee tamarta dib loo cusboonaysiin karo u yareysaa kharashka ku baxa dhismaha casriga ah?

en: Why is camel milk considered more nutritious than cow milk in many cultures?
so: Maxay caanaha geelu ugu tixgeliyaan inay ka nafaqo badan yihiin caanaha lo'da dhaqamo badan dhexdiis?

en: What materials do beavers use to build their strong underwater dams?
so: Agab noocee ah ayay af-mishaarradu u isticmaalaan inay ku dhistaan biyo-xireennadooda xooggan ee biyaha hoostooda ah?

en: How can 3D printing technology reduce the waste in construction projects?
so: Sidee tiknoolajiyada 3D-ga ee daabacaadda u yareyn kartaa qashinka mashaariicda dhismaha?

en: Explain the importance of accurate land surveying before starting a foundation.
so: Sharax muhiimadda ay leedahay cabbirka dhulka ee saxda ah ka hor intaan la bilaabin aasaaska.

en: What are the environmental impacts of modern skyscrapers on city air quality?
so: Waa maxay saameynta deegaanka ee dabaqyada dhaadheer ku leeyihiin tayada hawada magaalada?

en: How do cranes migrate across continents using thermal air currents?
so: Sidee karaanadu (cranes) ugu guuraan qaaradaha iyagoo isticmaalaya hirarka hawada kulul?

en: Why is it important to use eco-friendly materials in sustainable housing?
so: Maxay muhiim u tahay in agabka deegaanka u saaxiibka ah loo isticmaalo guryaha waara?

en: How does city planning improve the quality of life for its residents?
so: Sidee naqshadaynta magaaladu u horumarisaa tayada nolosha dadka deggan?

en: What is the best way to maintain a solar power system for a long time?
so: Waa maxay habka ugu wanaagsan ee lagu daryeeli karo nidaamka tamarta cadceedda muddo dheer?

en: Great oaks from little acorns grow.
so: Geedaha waaweyn waxay ka baxaan miraha yaryar (Wax weyn ayaa ka dhasha wax yar).
Laba jeer cabbir, hal marna goo (Ka fiirso ka hor intaanad ficil samayn).

en: Home is where the heart is.
so: Gurigu waa halka ay raaxadu ku jirto (Qalbigaaga halkuu jiro ayaa gurigaaga ah).

en: The foundation is the most important part of a house.
so: Aasaasku waa qaybta ugu muhiimsan ee guriga.

en: Build your house on a rock, not on sand.
so: Gurigaaga ku dhis dhagax, ha ku dhisin ciid (Aasaas adag yeelo).

en: The 3D printer finished the architectural model with extreme precision.
so: Mashiinka 3D-ga wuxuu ku dhameeyay moodalkii dhismaha si aad u saxan.

en: Axmed's solar panels generated enough power for the entire office floor.
so: Muraayadaha cadceedda ee Axmed waxay soo saareen tamar ku filan dhammaan dabaqa xafiiska.

en: The beaver used its sharp teeth to cut through the thick branches.
so: Af-mishaarku wuxuu isticmaalay ilkahiisa afka badan si uu u gooyo laamaha dhumucda weyn.

en: He checked the blueprint on his tablet to verify the room dimensions.
so: Wuxuu tablet-kiisa ka hubiyey naqshadda (blueprint) si uu u xaqiijiyo cabbirka qolalka.

en: The electric drill has a rechargeable battery for use in remote areas.

en: Axmed used a sledgehammer to break down an old concrete wall.
so: Axmed wuxuu isticmaalay dubbe weyn (sledgehammer) si uu u jebiyo gidaar shub ah oo duug ah.

en: The spirit level showed that the floor was perfectly horizontal.
so: Miisaanka biyuhu wuxuu muujiyey in sagxaddu ay si sax ah u siman tahay.

en: Construction workers wore hard hats and high-visibility vests for safety.

en: Axmed's real estate project includes a communal park with indigenous trees.

en: The excavator dug a deep trench for the building's water pipes.

en: He used a laser level to project a straight line across the large site.

en: The 3D printer can use different materials like plastic, resin, and even concrete.
so: Mashiinka 3D-ga wuxuu isticmaali karaa agab kala duwan sida caagga, xabagta resin-ka, iyo xataa shubka.

en: Axmed's solar panels have a tracking system to follow the sun's path.
so: Muraayadaha cadceedda ee Axmed waxay leeyihiin nidaam daba-gal oo raaca jihada qorraxta.

so: Biyo-xireenka af-mishaarku wuxuu abuuray deegaan qoyan oo cusub oo ay degto makhluuqaad badan.

so: Axmed wuxuu isticmaalay malawiye (trowel) si uu u mariyo dhoobada shubka ah inta u dhaxaysa lebenka.

so: Miisaanka biyuhu waa qalab muhiim u ah hubinta in dhismuhu uu yahay mid deggan.

en: He used a digital measuring tape for quick calculations of the walls.

en: The 3D printer can produce complex shapes that are impossible to hand-make.

so: Wuxuu isticmaalay qisir (chisel) si uu ugu qaabeeyo jirridda qoriga ah ee albaabka weyn.

en: The spirit level has a green liquid that makes the bubble easy to see.
so: Miisaanka biyaha wuxuu leeyahay dareere cagaaran oo ka dhiga xumbada mid si fudud loo arko.

en: Construction sites can be dangerous, so proper training is required.
so: Goobaha dhismaha waxay noqon karaan kuwo khatar ah, markaas waxaa loo baahan yahay tababar habboon.

en: Axmed's new project focuses on high-density living with smart amenities.
so: Mashruuca cusub ee Axmed wuxuu diiradda saarayaa nolosha dadka badan ee leh agabka casriga ah.

en: The excavator operator must be skilled to navigate the tight spaces.
so: Wada mashiinka qodista waa inuu ahaado mid xirfadaysan si uu u dhex maro meelaha cidhiidhiga ah.

en: He used a ladder to reach the top of the solar panel array.
so: Wuxuu isticmaalay sallaan si uu u gaaro meesha ugu sarreysa ee muraayadaha cadceedda.

so: Mashiinka 3D-ga wuxuu isticmaalaa nidaam lagu magacaabo 'wax-ku-kordhin' si uu wax u dhiso.

en: Axmed's solar energy system reduces the building's carbon footprint.
so: Nidaamka tamarta cadceedda ee Axmed wuxuu yareeyaa qiiqa wasakhaysan ee dhismaha.

en: The beaver's fur is waterproof, allowing it to stay warm in cold water.
so: Dhogorta af-mishaarku biyuhu ma dhex maraan, taasoo u oggolaanaysa inay ku kululaato biyaha qabow.

en: He used a wrench to tighten the bolts on the heavy machinery.
so: Wuxuu isticmaalay kiciye si uu u adkeeyo boolasha mashiinnada cul-culus.

so: Mashiinka daloolintu waa qalab dhinacyo badan loo isticmaali karo oo u roon xirfadlayaasha iyo dadka guriga wax ku karsada.

en: Axmed used a sander to smooth the surface of the wooden balcony.
so: Axmed wuxuu isticmaalay mashiinka lagu ruxo (sander) si uu u simo dusha balakoonka qoriga ah.

en: The spirit level is durable and can withstand the harsh conditions of a site.
so: Miisaanka biyuhu waa mid waara, waana uu u adkaysan karaa xaaladaha adag ee goobta shaqada.

en: Axmed's real estate firm is committed to urban regeneration projects.

so: Baaldiga mashiinka qodista wuxuu u xooggan yahay inuu soo qaado dhagaxaan waaweyn.

so: Mashiinka 3D-ga wuxuu beddelayaa sida aan u tixgelinno dhismaha degdegga ah.

en: Axmed's solar panels provide a reliable source of power during blackouts.

so: Wuxuu isticmaalay dubbe alwaax ah (mallet) si uu si tartiib ah ugu garaaco kala-goysyada qoriga.

en: The beaver's engineering impacts local ecosystems in positive ways.

en: Axmed launched a new logistics company using electric vans and delivery drones to transport goods.

en: He purchased a private jet for international business trips and hired a skilled pilot.

en: What biological features allow storks to glide for long periods without flapping?

en: What is the best way to manage a large fleet of vehicles using software?
so: Waa maxay habka ugu wanaagsan ee lagu maareeyo tiro badan oo gawaari ah iyadoo la isticmaalayo software?

en: Time flies when you are having fun.

Inaad soo daahdo ayaa ka fiican inaadan waligaa imaan.

en: Smooth landing is the sign of a good pilot.

en: Psychology studies human behavior and mind.

Dib-u-warshadaynta alaabtu waxay badbaadisaa kheyraadka dabiiciga ah.

en: Biodiversity is essential for life on Earth.
so: Kala duwanaanshaha noolaha waa muhiim u ah nolosha dhulka.

en: Protecting endangered species is a global duty.
so: Badbaadinta noocyada dabar-go'aya waa waajib caalami ah.
Beerrada qaranku waxay dhowraan hoyga duur-joogta.

en: Urbanization reduces the space for nature.
Overfishing depletes the life in the oceans.
so: Kalluumeysiga xad-dhaafka ah wuxuu yareeyaa nolosha badaha.

en: Sustainable development balances growth and nature.
so: Horumarka waara wuxuu dheelli-tiraa koritaanka iyo dabeecadda.

en: Science helps us understand the universe.
so: Saynisku wuxuu naga caawiyaa inaan fahanno caalamka.

en: Curiosity is the fuel for scientific discovery.
so: Xiisaha ogaal-doonku waa shidaalka helitaanka sayniska.

en: Theories are tested multiple times for accuracy.
so: Aragtiyaha waxaa la tijaabiyaa dhowr jeer si loo xaqiijiyo.

en: Mathematics is the foundation of all sciences.
Physics describes the laws of motion.
Thermodynamics deals with heat and energy.
so: Tarmodaanamiggu wuxuu ka hadlaa kuleylka iyo tamarta.

en: Quantum mechanics explores very small particles.
so: Kwantum makaaniggu wuxuu baaraa makhluuqaadka aadka u yar.
Aragtida isu-dheelitirka (Relativity) waxay sharraxdaa cufis-jiidka iyo waqtiga.

en: Astronomy is the study of stars and planets.
so: Astronomi-gu waa barashada xiddigaha iyo meereyaasha.

en: Cosmology studies the origin of the universe.
The Big Bang theory explains the beginning.
so: Aragtida Big Bang-ga waxay sharraxdaa bilowgii caalamka.

en: Light years measure distances in space.
so: Sannad-iftiin ayaa lagu cabbiraa fogaanta hawada sare.

en: Gravity is the force that keeps us on Earth.
so: Cufis-jiidku waa xoogga nagu haya dhulka dushiisa.

en: The speed of light is a constant in physics.
so: Xawaaraha iftiinku waa wax aan isbeddelin cilmiga fiisigiska.

en: Dark matter makes up most of the universe.
so: Maaddada madow (Dark matter) ayaa ka kooban inta badan caalamka.

en: Black holes consume everything around them.
so: Godadka madow waxay liqaan wax kasta oo hareerahooda ah.

en: Space is a vacuum with no air or sound.
so: Hawada sare waa meel maran oo aan lahayn hawo ama dhawaaq.

en: Satellites orbit the Earth for communication.
so: Dayax-gacmeedyadu waxay ku wareegaan dhulka xiriirka dartiis.

en: The space station is a home for researchers.
so: Saldhigga hawada sare waa hoyga cilmi-baarayaasha.

en: Robots are exploring the surface of Mars.
so: Robot-yada ayaa baaraya dusha sare ee meeraha Mars.

en: Humanity hopes to live on other planets.
so: Bini-aadanku waxay rajeynayaan inay ku noolaadaan meereyaal kale.

en: Technology is the application of science.
Computers use binary code to process data.
so: Kombuyuutarradu waxay isticmaalaan koodhka binary-ga si ay xogta u farsameeyaan.
Internetku wuxuu isku xiraa dadka adduunka oo dhan.
Koodhaynta (Encryption) waxay xogta dhijitaalka ah ka dhigtaa mid ammaan ah.

en: Artificial intelligence can learn from patterns.
so: Sirdoonka macmalka ahi wuxuu wax ka baran karaa qaababka.

en: Machine learning improves with more data.
so: Barashada mashiinku waxay ku horumartaa xog badan.

en: Cloud storage allows access from anywhere.
so: Kaydka daruuraha (Cloud) wuxuu saamaxayaa gelitaanka meel kasta.
Telefoonada casriga ah waa kombuyuutarro jeebka lagu suto oo xooggan.
Amniga internetka waa iska difaacista jabsadayaasha.
Baraha bulshadu waxay saameeyaan dhaqanka dadka.

en: Data privacy is a major concern today.
so: Sirta xogta waa walaac weyn oo jira maanta.

en: Automation is replacing some manual jobs.
so: Is-maamulidda mashiinnada ayaa beddelaysa qaar ka mid ah shaqooyinka gacanta.
Ganacsiga internetka wuxuu saamaxayaa adeegashada guriga.

en: Digital currency is a new form of money.
so: Lacagta dhijitaalka ah waa nooc cusub oo lacag ah.

en: Block-chain technology is used for security.
so: Tignoolajiyada block-chain-ka waxaa loo isticmaalaa ammaanka.
Xaqiiqada dhalanteedka ah (VR) waxay abuurtaa jawi dhab u eg.

en: Augmented reality adds digital elements to life.
so: Xaqiiqada kordhaysa (AR) waxay nolosha ku dartaa walxo dhijitaal ah.

en: Drones are used for delivery and filming.
so: Diroon-yada waxaa loo isticmaalaa rarka iyo duubista filimada.

en: 3D printing can build houses and tools.
so: Daabacaadda 3D-ga waxay dhisi kartaa guryo iyo qalab.

en: Nanotechnology works with very small atoms.
so: Naano-tignoolajiyadu waxay ku shaqaysaa atamo aad u yar.

en: Biotechnology is used in farming and health.
so: Bayootignoolajiyada waxaa loo isticmaalaa beeraha iyo caafimaadka.

en: Clean energy is the future of our planet.
so: Tamarta nadiifta ah waa mustaqbalka meerahayaga.

en: Space tourism is becoming a reality.
so: Dalxiiska hawada sare wuxuu noqonayaa xaqiiqo.

en: Self-driving cars use sensors to move.
so: Gawaarida is-wada waxay isticmaalaan dareemayaal si ay u socdaan.

en: The universe is full of secrets to find.
so: Caalamku wuxuu ka buuxaa sirro la rabo in la helo.

en: Life is a complex chemical process.
so: Noloshu waa geedi-socod kiimiko oo isku murugsan.

en: Every human is unique because of Dii-en-ee.
so: Qof kasta oo bini-aadan ah waa mid gaar ah Dii-en-ee dartiis.

en: Protecting the Earth is our common goal.
The power of the mind is limitless.
Knowledge is the key to a better world.
so: Aqoontu waa furaha adduun ka wanaagsan.
Had iyo jeer baro oo baadi-goob wax cusub.

en: Humanity has a bright future with science.
so: Bini-aadanku waxay leeyihiin mustaqbal ifaya oo dhinaca sayniska ah.

en: The end of this lesson is just the beginning.
so: Dhammaadka casharkan waa uun bilowga mid cusub.
Saynisku marnaba ma joojiyo ka jawaabista su'aalaha.

en: The man was arrested for the crime.
The male suspect escaped from the police.
so: Eedaysanihii labka ahaa ayaa ka baxsaday booliska.

en: The female doctor performed the surgery.
so: Dhakhtaraddii dhedigga ahayd ayaa samaysay qaliinka.

en: The boy is playing soccer in the field.
so: Wiilku wuxuu kubbadda cagta ku ciyaarayaa garoonka.

en: The girl is reading a book in the library.
so: Gartu waxay buug ku akhrinaysaa maktabadda.

en: The gentleman opened the door for her.
The lady was wearing a beautiful dress.
so: Marwadu waxay xirnayn dhar qurux badan.

en: The husband supported his wife's career.
so: Saygu wuxuu garab istaagay shaqada xaaskiisa.

en: He left a secret message in his will before he died.
so: Wuxuu reebay fariin qarsoodi ah dardaarankiisa ka hor intaanu dhiman.

en: A neighbor heard a loud scream in the middle of the night.
so: Darish ayaa maqlay qaylo dheer saqbadhkii habeenkii.

en: The killer cleaned the blood to hide the evidence.
so: Gacan-ku-dhiiglihii wuxuu nadiifiyey dhiiggii si uu u qariyo caddaynta.

en: Cameras caught the thief breaking the window.
so: Kaamirooyinka ayaa qabtay tuugga oo jebinaya daaqadda.

en: The detective found a fingerprint on the glass.
so: Baaraha wuxuu muraayadda ka helay raadka farta.

en: He poisoned the water supply to infect the whole town.
so: Wuxuu sumeeyay kaydka biyaha si uu u qaadsiiyo magaalada oo dhan.

en: The victim was found in an abandoned house.
so: Qofkii la dhibateeyay waxaa laga helay guri cidla ah.

en: They used a Dii-en-ee sample to identify the body.
so: Waxay isticmaaleen muunad Dii-en-ee ah si loo aqoonsado meydka.

en: The judge sentenced the criminal to life in prison.
so: Xaakinku wuxuu dambiilaha ku xukumay xabsi daa'im.

en: He pretended to be a doctor to kidnap the baby.
so: Wuxuu iska dhigay dhakhtar si uu u afduubto ilmaha.

en: The poison was so strong it killed him in minutes.
so: Suntu waxay ahayd mid aad u xooggan oo ku dishay dhowr daqiiqo gudahood.

en: She hid the money under the floorboards.
so: Lacagtii waxay ku qarisay looxaanta sagxadda hoostooda.

en: The witness was afraid to speak in court.
so: Markhaatigii wuxuu ka baqay inuu ka hadlo maxkamadda.

en: The bank robbery was planned for months.
so: Dhaca bangiga waxaa loo qorsheeyay muddo bilooyin ah.

en: A hacker stole thousands of passwords from the server.
so: Haakar ayaa xaday kumanaan erey-sir ah oo ku jiray server-ka.

en: He used a fake ID to cross the border.
so: Wuxuu isticmaalay aqoonsi been abuur ah si uu xudduudda uga gudbo.

en: The scientist discovered a new species of bacteria.
so: Saynisyahanku wuxuu helay nooc cusub oo bakteeriyo ah.

en: A black hole can swallow an entire star.
so: Godka madow wuxuu liqi karaa xiddig dhan.

en: Light from the sun takes eight minutes to reach Earth.
so: Iftiinka qorraxda wuxuu ku qaataa siddeed daqiiqo inuu dhulka soo gaaro.

en: The human brain is more active during sleep than during the day.
so: Maskaxda bini-aadanku way ka shaqo badan tahay xilliga hurdada marka loo eego maalinta.

en: Sharks have been on Earth longer than trees.
so: Libaxyada badda waxay dhulka joogeen muddo ka dheer geedaha.

en: Your heart can beat outside your body for a short time.
so: Wadnahaagu wuxuu garaaci karaa jirka dibadiisa muddo yar.

en: Some jellyfish are immortal and can live forever.
so: Qaar ka mid ah xubno-biyoodka (jellyfish) ma dhintaan, waligoodna way noolaan karaan.

en: There are more stars in the universe than grains of sand on Earth.
so: Xiddigo ka badan ciidda dhulka ayaa ku jira koonka.

en: Octopuses have three hearts and blue blood.
so: Atoobaska wuxuu leeyahay saddex wadne iyo dhiig buluug ah.

en: Venus is the hottest planet in our solar system.
so: Fiinas waa meeraha ugu kulul nidaamka qorraxda.

en: A bolt of lightning is hotter than the surface of the sun.
so: Danabka hillaaca ayaa ka kulul dusha sare ee qorraxda.
Shinidu waxay garan kartaa wejiyada bini-aadanka.

en: Ants never sleep and don't have lungs.
so: Quraanjadu marnaba ma seexato, mana laha sambabbo.

en: The human body contains enough carbon to lead 9,000 pencils.
so: Jirka bini-aadanku wuxuu ka kooban yahay kaarboon ku filan 9,000 oo qalin-rasaas ah.

en: Rats laugh when they are tickled.
so: Jiirku waa qoslaa marka la qidqido.
Muusku wuxuu leeyahay shucaac aad u yar.

en: The Eiffel Tower grows taller in the summer heat.
so: Taallada Eiffel waxay dhererkeedu kordhaa kulaylka xagaaga.

en: A day on Venus is longer than a year on Venus.
so: Maalin meeraha Fiinas ka mid ah ayaa ka dheer sannad dhan oo meerahaas ah.

en: Honey never spoils; archaeologists found edible honey in Egyptian tombs.
so: Malabku ma xumaado; arkiyoolajistuhu waxay heleen malab la cuni karo oo ku jiray qabriyadii Masar.

en: Your fingernails grow faster on your dominant hand.
so: Ciddiyahaagu waxay si dhakhso ah ugu koraan gacanta aad u isticmaalka badan tahay.

en: Water can boil and freeze at the same time under specific conditions.
so: Biyuhu way karkari karaan, haddana way barafoobi karaan isku mar xaalado gaar ah.

en: Owls don't have eyeballs; they have eye tubes.
so: Guumaysadu ma laha xubno-indho; waxay leeyihiin dhuumaha indhaha.

en: A human can live for weeks without food but only days without water.
so: Bini-aadanku wuxuu noolaan karaa toddobaadyo cunto la'aan, laakiin maalmo qura biyo la'aan.

en: The average person walks the equivalent of five times around the world in their life.
so: Qofka caadiga ah wuxuu socdaa qiyaastii shan jeer oo u dhiganta wareegga dunida inta uu nool yahay.

en: Hot water freezes faster than cold water.
so: Biyaha kulul waxay u barafoobaan si ka dhakhso badan biyaha qabow.

en: Gold is edible in small amounts.
so: Dahabka waa la cuni karaa haddii uu aad u yar yahay.

en: Elephants are the only animals that cannot jump.
so: Maroodigu waa xayawaanka kaliya ee aan boodi karin.

en: Cows have best friends and get stressed when separated.
so: Lo'du waxay leeyihiin saaxiibo dhow, wayna walbahaaraan marka la kala saaro.

en: The king of hearts is the only king without a mustache in a deck of cards.
so: Boqorka qalbigu waa boqorka kaliya ee aan shaarbo lahayn kaararka ciyaarta.

en: Tigers have striped skin, not just striped fur.
so: Shabeelku wuxuu leeyahay maqaar xariijimo leh, maahan kaliya dhogorta.

en: A snail can sleep for three years.
so: Dilaac-madowgu wuxuu seexan karaa saddex sano.
Balanbaalistu waxay wax ku dhadhamisaa lugaheeda.

en: The strongest muscle in the body is the tongue.
so: Muruqa ugu xooggan jirka waa carrabka.

en: Crocodiles cannot stick their tongue out.
so: Yaxaasasku ma soo saari karaan carrabkooda dibadda.

en: A shrimp's heart is located in its head.
so: Wadnaha kambaaluhu wuxuu ku yaallaa madaxiisa.

en: It is impossible to sneeze with your eyes open.
so: Suurtagal maahan inaad hindhisto adigoo indhahaagu furan yihiin.
Saxarada xayawaanka wombat waa qaab labajibaaran.

en: Sloths can hold their breath longer than dolphins.
so: Xayawaanka sloth-ka ayaa neefta ceshan kara muddo ka dheer dolfiinka.

en: The brain does not feel pain.
A small child could swim through the veins of a blue whale.
so: Ilmo yar wuxuu dhex dabaalan karaa xididdada nibiriga buluugga ah.

en: There are more cells of bacteria in your body than human cells.
so: Jirkaaga waxaa ku jira unugyo bakteeriyo ah oo ka badan unugyada bini-aadanka.

en: Your eyes stay the same size from birth, but your nose and ears never stop growing.
so: Indhahaagu isku weynaan bay ahaanayaan tan iyo dhalashada, laakiin sankaaga iyo dhegahaagu marnaba ma joojiyaan koritaanka.

en: Human teeth are as strong as shark teeth.
so: Ilkaha bini-aadanku waxay u xooggan yihiin sida ilkaha libax-badeedka.

en: If you could fold a piece of paper 42 times, it would reach the moon.
so: Haddii aad laabi karto xaashi 42 jeer, waxay gaari lahayd dayaxa.

en: The skeleton of an adult has 206 bones.
so: Qalfoofka qofka weyn wuxuu leeyahay 206 lafood.

en: A newborn baby has about 300 bones.
so: Ilmaha cusub ee dhasha wuxuu leeyahay qiyaastii 300 oo lafood.

en: The smallest bone in the body is in the ear.
so: Lafta ugu yar jirka waxay ku jirtaa dhegta.

en: Enamel on teeth is the hardest substance in the human body.
so: Muraayadda ilkaha (enamel) waa walaxda ugu adag jirka bini-aadanka.

en: Blood makes up about 8% of your total body weight.
so: Dhiiggu wuxuu ka dhigan yahay qiyaastii 8% culeyska jirkaaga.

en: The large intestine is shorter than the small intestine.
so: Mindhicirka weyn wuxuu ka gaaban yahay mindhicirka yar.

en: Your left lung is smaller than your right lung to make room for your heart.
so: Sambabkaaga bidix ayaa ka yar kan midig si uu boos u siiyo wadnaha.

en: An adult human is made of 7 octillion atoms.
so: Qofka weyn wuxuu ka samaysan yahay 7 oktooliyaan oo atamo ah.

en: We lose about 50 to 100 hairs every day.
so: Waxaan weynaa qiyaastii 50 ilaa 100 timo ah maalin kasta.

en: The surface area of a human lung is equal to a tennis court.
so: Bedka dusha sare ee sambabka bini-aadanka wuxuu la mid yahay garoonka teeniska.

en: A person produces enough saliva in their life to fill two swimming pools.
so: Qofku wuxuu soo saaraa candhuuf ku filan labo barkadood oo dabaasha inta uu nool yahay.

en: The smell of rain is caused by bacteria in the soil.
so: Urta roobka waxaa sababa bakteeriyada ku jirta carada.

en: Thunder is the sound made by lightning.
so: Onkodku waa dhawaaqa uu hillaacu sameeyo.

en: A cloud can weigh more than a million pounds.
so: Daruurtu waxay miisaankeedu ka badan karaa hal milyan oo bownd.

en: Snow is not white; it is actually clear.
so: Barafku maahan cad; dhab ahaantii waa mid hufan (muraayad oo kale).

en: Diamonds are made of carbon under high pressure.
so: Dahabka cad (Diamonds) wuxuu ka samaysan yahay kaarboon cadais sare ku jira.

en: Lava can reach temperatures of 1,200 degrees Celsius.
so: Laafada foolkaanaha waxay gaari kartaa kulayl dhan 1,200 darajo Salsiyas.

en: A hurricane can release as much energy as 10,000 nuclear bombs.
so: Dabaylaha xooggan ee duufaantu waxay soo deyn karaan tamar la mid ah 10,000 oo bam nukliyeer ah.

en: Trees talk to each other through underground fungi networks.
so: Geeduhu waxay isula hadlaan shabakadaha fangaska ee dhulka hoostiisa ku jira.

en: The Earth's core is as hot as the surface of the sun.
so: Badhtamaha dhulku wuxuu u kulul yahay sida dusha sare ee qorraxda.

en: Water expands when it freezes, unlike most other liquids.
so: Biyuhu way ballaartaan marka ay barafoobaan, si ka duwan dareerayaasha kale.

en: The speed of sound is faster in water than in air.
so: Xawaaraha dhawaaqu wuxuu ka dheereeyaa biyaha marka loo eego hawada.

en: Glass is actually a very slow-moving liquid.
so: Muraayadda dhab ahaantii waa dareere u socda si aad u gaabis ah.

en: Fire has no shadow because it is a source of light.
so: Dabku ma laha hoos sababtoo ah isagaa ah isha iftiinka.

en: Sound cannot travel through a vacuum.
so: Dhawaaqu ma dhex mari karo meel hawo la'aan ah.

en: Helium is the only element that cannot be frozen by cooling alone.
so: Hiliyaamtu waa walaxda kaliya ee aan baraf noqon karin qaboojin kaliya.

en: Oxygen in the liquid state is pale blue.
so: Ogsajiinta marka ay dareere tahay waa buluug khafiif ah.

en: Mercury is the only metal that is liquid at room temperature.
so: Meerkuriga waa birta kaliya ee dareere ah heerkulka qolka.

en: Plutonium was the first element made by humans.
so: Bulutooniyaamtu waxay ahayd walaxdii ugu horreysay ee bini-aadanku sameeyo.

en: The first computer mouse was made of wood.
so: Jiirkii ugu horreeyay ee kombuyuutarka wuxuu ka samaysnaa qori.

en: The first text message ever sent said Merry Christmas.
so: Fariintii ugu horreysay ee telefoon lagu diro waxay ahayd Merry Christmas.

en: A single Google search uses as much energy as a light bulb for 17 seconds.
so: Hal baaritaan oo Google ah wuxuu isticmaalaa tamar la mid ah guluubka iftiinka muddo 17 ilbiriqsi ah.

en: More people have mobile phones than toilets.
so: Dadka haysta telefoonada ayaa ka badan dadka haysta musqulaha.

en: The QWERTY keyboard was designed to slow down typing.
so: Kiiboodhka QWERTY waxaa loo naqshadeeyay inuu dib u dhigo xawaaraha qoraalka.

en: Nintendo was founded in 1889 as a playing card company.
so: Nintendo waxaa la aasaasay 1889-kii iyadoo ahayd shirkad kaararka ciyaarta ah.

en: The first domain name ever registered was symbolics.com.
so: Magacii ugu horreeyay ee internetka laga diwaangaliyo wuxuu ahaa symbolics.com.

en: Amazon started as an online bookstore.
so: Amazon waxay ku bilaabatay dukaan buugaagta lagu iibiyo oo internetka ah.

en: The internet and the World Wide Web are not the same thing.
so: Internet-ka iyo World Wide Web-ka maahan hal wax.

en: A typical hacker attack happens every 39 seconds.
so: Weerarka haakariska wuxuu dhacaa qiyaastii 39 ilbiriqsi kasta.

en: Email existed before the World Wide Web.
so: Iimeylku wuxuu jiray ka hor World Wide Web-ka.

en: The first website is still online today.
so: Websaydhka ugu horreeyay ilaa maanta internetka ayuu ku jiraa.

en: NASA's internet speed is 91 gigabits per second.
so: Xawaaraha internet-ka ee NASA waa 91 gigabit ilbiriqsigiiba.

en: The first digital camera was only 0.01 megapixels.
so: Kaamiradii ugu horreysay ee dhijitaal ah waxay ahayd 0.01 megabiksal oo qura.

en: YouTube was originally intended to be a dating site.
so: YouTube markii hore waxaa loogu talagalay inuu noqdo goob lagu kulmo.

en: Facebook is blue because Mark Zuckerberg is red-green color blind.
so: Facebook waa buluug sababtoo ah Mark Zuckerberg ma kala saari karo midabada casaanka iyo cagaarka.

en: There are over 1.8 billion websites in the world.
so: Waxaa jira in ka badan 1.8 bilyan oo websaydh adduunka oo dhan.

en: The first iPod had a hidden game.
so: iPod-kii ugu horreeyay wuxuu lahaa ciyaar qarsoon.
Shimbirta Twitter-ka waxaa la yiraahdaa Larry.

en: The term robot comes from a Czech word meaning forced labor.
so: Erayga robot wuxuu ka yimid eray Czech ah oo la micno ah shaqo lagu qasbay.

en: The first Apple computer was sold for six hundred sixty-six dollars.
so: Kombuyuutarkii ugu horreeyay ee Apple waxaa lagu iibiyay lix boqol lixdan iyo lix doollar.

en: Psychology says that if you announce your goals, you are less likely to succeed.
so: Cilmi-nafsigu wuxuu leeyahay haddii aad sheegto yoolalkaaga, fursadda aad ku guulaysanayso way yaraanaysaa.

en: Your favorite song is likely associated with an emotional event.
so: Heesta aad ugu jeceshahay waxay u dhowdahay inay ku xiran tahay dhacdo dareen leh.

en: Music changes your perception of time.
Being alone for long periods is as bad for health as smoking.
so: Inaad keligaa ahaato muddo dheer waxay u xun tahay caafimaadka sida sigaarka.

en: The brain treats rejection like physical pain.
so: Maskaxdu waxay ula dhaqantaa diidmada sida xanuunka jirka oo kale.

en: Most people can only maintain focus for about 20 minutes.
so: Dadka badankoodu waxay fooganaantooda haysan karaan qiyaastii 20 daqiiqo.

en: People are more honest when they are tired.
so: Dadku way ka run-sheegsan yihiin marka ay daallan yihiin.

en: Crying can reduce stress and make you feel better.
so: Oohintu waxay yareyn kartaa walbahaarka waxayna kaa dhigi kartaa inaad dareento ladnaan.

en: Smart people tend to underestimate themselves.
so: Dadka caqliga badan waxay u dhow yihiin inay naftooda dhayalsadaan.

en: Our brain has a negativity bias, remembering bad news more than good news.
so: Maskaxdeenu waxay u janjeertaa dhinaca xun, iyadoo xasuusata warka xun in ka badan kan wanaagsan.

en: The feeling of falling while sleeping is called a hypnic jerk.
so: Dareenka dhicitaanka inta aad huruddo waxaa la yiraahdaa xulashada hurdada (hypnic jerk).

en: Sarcasm is a sign of a healthy brain.
so: Hadal-ku-dhaca (Sarcasm) waa calaamad muujinaysa maskax caafimaad qabta.

en: Talking to yourself can improve your memory and focus.
so: Inaad naftaada la hadasho waxay hagaajin kartaa xasuustaada iyo fooganaantaada.

en: The human attention span is now shorter than a goldfish's.
so: Fooganaanta bini-aadanku hadda way ka gaaban tahay tan kalluunka dahabiga ah.

en: Thinking about your problems in a foreign language can lead to more rational decisions.

en: The boy told a lie to his parents.
